# Multimedia Services[¶](#multimedia-services "Link to this heading")

The modules described in this chapter implement various algorithms or interfaces
that are mainly useful for multimedia applications. They are available at the
discretion of the installation. Here’s an overview:

* [`wave` — Read and write WAV files](wave.html)
  + [Wave\_read Objects](wave.html#wave-read-objects)
  + [Wave\_write Objects](wave.html#wave-write-objects)
* [`colorsys` — Conversions between color systems](colorsys.html)
